---
title: "Liens utiles"
subtitle: "Documentation, bibliothèques et tutoriels Julia"
toc: true
---

## [Documentation]{.casc-section-title}

```{=html}
<div class="grid">
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-card" href="https://docs.julialang.org/en/v1/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-book-fill"></i></span>
      <h3>Documentation Julia</h3>
      <p>Documentation officielle complète du langage.</p>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-card" href="https://learnxinyminutes.com/docs/julia" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-stopwatch-fill"></i></span>
      <h3>Learn X in Y minutes</h3>
      <p>Cheat-sheet rapide pour Julia.</p>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-card" href="https://github.com/xorJane/Introduction_to_Julia_tutorials" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i></span>
      <h3>Tutoriels d'introduction</h3>
      <p>Notebooks d'introduction (cf. vidéo plus bas).</p>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-card" href="https://modernjuliaworkflows.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill"></i></span>
      <h3>MoJuWo</h3>
      <p>Modern Julia Workflows — bonnes pratiques.</p>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-card" href="https://gdalle.github.io/JuliaPerf-CERMICS/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-speedometer2"></i></span>
      <h3>Julia performance</h3>
      <p>Optimisation et benchmarking en Julia.</p>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
```

## [Bibliothèques]{.casc-section-title}

```{=html}
<div class="grid">
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-4">
    <a class="casc-card" href="https://github.com/JuliaPlots/Plots.jl" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i></span>
      <h3>Plots.jl</h3>
      <p>Visualisation polyvalente.</p>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-4">
    <a class="casc-card" href="https://github.com/JuliaMath/Polynomials.jl" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i></span>
      <h3>Polynomials.jl</h3>
      <p>Manipulation de polynômes.</p>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-4">
    <a class="casc-card" href="https://github.com/JuliaMath/Interpolations.jl" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-soundwave"></i></span>
      <h3>Interpolations.jl</h3>
      <p>Interpolation multidimensionnelle.</p>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-4">
    <a class="casc-card" href="https://github.com/JuliaDiff/ForwardDiff.jl" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i></span>
      <h3>ForwardDiff.jl</h3>
      <p>Différentiation automatique en mode direct.</p>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-4">
    <a class="casc-card" href="https://github.com/FluxML/Zygote.jl" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-graph-down-arrow"></i></span>
      <h3>Zygote.jl</h3>
      <p>Différentiation automatique en mode inverse.</p>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
```

## [Vidéos]{.casc-section-title}

### Intro to Julia tutorial

[<i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> Notebooks associés](https://github.com/xorJane/Introduction_to_Julia_tutorials){.casc-action-btn .ghost target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/8h8rQyEpiZA >}}

### The Unreasonable Effectiveness of Multiple Dispatch

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/kc9HwsxE1OY >}}

### Automatic Differentiation in 10 minutes

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/vAp6nUMrKYg >}}
